case_title: ELISANDRO CAMPOS VS. MICHAEL J. ALIOTO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,310.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, ELISANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO, MICHAEL J. CENTONI, GINA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALIOTO, MICHAEL J. CENTONI, GINA M. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ELISANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT ($50.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ELISANDRO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED APR-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ELISANDRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT GINA CENTONI WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT GINA CENTONI WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ELISANDRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALIOTO, MICHAEL J. CENTONI, GINA M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ALIOTO, MICHAEL J. CENTONI, GINA M. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ELISANDRO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
